description: Determines the type and nature of a spell. Roll to get context for the spell, then follow the instructions to roll on the appropriate Spell Effect table.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the type and nature of a spell. Roll to get context for the spell, then follow the instructions to roll on the appropriate Spell Effect table.

entries.description: Involves air or atmosphere (smoke, mist, wind). Roll on Random Spell Effect

descriptionTranslations.en: Involves air or atmosphere (smoke, mist, wind). Roll on Random Spell Effect

entries.description: Involves an animal found in nature. Roll on Random Spell Effect
